summary: Completed comprehensive testing of consolidated dashboard features. All 14 features tested and verified: Personal Dashboard with 5 tabs (Overview, Retirement, Portfolio, Assets, Insights), Smart Insights with AI-generated insights, Client Portal with simplified single-page view, navigation consolidation, and hybrid-engine API for retirement confidence.

issues: Recharts warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - charts may briefly show warning on tab switch but render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Consolidation complete. Personal Dashboard at /personal-dashboard has 5 tabs (Overview, Retirement, Portfolio, Assets, Insights). Client Portal at /client-portal is simplified single-page view. Smart Insights uses localStorage for manual insights (MOCKED). Mock portfolio data in PersonalDashboard for demo. Compliance modal appears on page load - dismiss with Escape key.
